landing.title: Krishi Route
landing.subtitle: Agricultural Route Optimization Platform
landing.description: Optimize your agricultural supply chain with intelligent route planning and profit calculation
landing.heroTitle: Find the most profitable mandi for your crops
landing.heroDescription: Live government prices + transport cost = maximum farmer profit.

features.title: Features
features.routeOptimizationDesc: Find the most efficient routes to markets
features.profitCalculationDesc: Calculate accurate profits with real-time data

calculatorSection.title: Try it now
calculatorSection.description: Enter your details below. We'll use live government data to find your best mandi.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Four simple steps from your field to best mandi.

selectCrop.title: Select crop & quantity
selectCrop.description: Choose your crop and how much you want to sell (in quintals).

chooseTransport.title: Choose transport & location
chooseTransport.description: Pick your vehicle and enter your location for accurate distance.

fetchPrices.title: Fetch live mandi prices
fetchPrices.description: We use official government API to get real-time prices across mandis.

getBestMandi.title: Get best mandi with max profit
getBestMandi.description: We recommend the mandi that gives you the highest net profit.

whyKrishiRoute.title: Why Krishi-Route?
whyKrishiRoute.description: Built for Indian farmers, powered by government data.

higherProfit.title: Higher profit per trip
higherProfit.desc: Sell where you earn more, not just where it's nearest.

verifiedData.title: Verified government data
verifiedData.desc: Prices from data.gov.in — transparent and trustworthy.

transportAware.title: Transport-aware pricing
transportAware.desc: Fuel and vehicle cost included in every recommendation.

savesTime.title: Saves time & fuel
savesTime.desc: One decision, one route — no guesswork.

locationBased.title: Location-based results
locationBased.desc: Recommendations based on your actual location.

farmerFirst.title: Farmer-first design
farmerFirst.desc: Built for Indian farmers, in your language and context.

mapSection.title: Not the nearest mandi — the smartest mandi
mapSection.description: We show you routes and compare real transport costs so you can choose the mandi that gives you the highest net profit, not just the one closest by.

trust.description: Krishi-Route uses only official government mandi price data. No guesswork — just transparent, verifiable numbers to help you make the best selling decision.

testimonial.quote: Earlier I sold at the nearest mandi. Now I sell at the most profitable mandi.
testimonial.author: Farmer, North India

finalCta.title: Your hard work deserves the best price.
finalCta.description: Join farmers who are already making smarter mandi choices with live government data.
